title: althaea unguiculata
intro: Althaea unguiculata, also known as the marshmallow plant or Egyptian marshmallow, is a type of perennial herb belonging to the mallow family. The plant has been used for centuries for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and soothing effects on the digestive system. The root and leaves of Althaea unguiculata contain mucilages, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including constipation, diarrhea, and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and syrups can be made from the plant, providing relief from irritations and promoting overall well-being.
